prompt: Look into Professor Jennifer Doudna's lab at UC Berkeley for a PhD. My background is biochemistry — I did two years of undergrad research on lipid nanoparticle delivery of CRISPR components and I'm interested in gene-editing therapeutics. Is this a good lab for me and what would I want to highlight in outreach?

assertions.text: No fabrication: flags uncertainty / unavailable enrichment honestly
Captures explicit contact/application rules (do-not-email / program routing) in the profile
Routes hooks to SOP/application when cold email is discouraged
